settings.migration.title: Legacy dictionary reset
settings.migration.description: An older merged dictionary was backed up and reset so industry packs are scoped correctly now. Your active pack setting was kept, but personal terms and rules need to be re-added if they lived only in the old merged file.
general.language.label: Language
general.microphone.heading: Microphone
general.sounds.heading: Sounds
general.sounds.enableDescription: Play audio feedback when recording starts and stops
general.startup.heading: Startup
general.startup.launchDescription: Start YOLO Voice automatically when you log in
general.startup.minimizedDescription: Hide the main window on launch, only show tray icon
general.pill.label: Show pill indicator
general.pill.description: Keep the recording pill visible on screen even when not recording
general.mediaPause.label: Auto-pause media
general.mediaPause.description: Toggle media playback when recording starts and stops
hotkeys.dictationHotkey.heading: Dictation Hotkey
hotkeys.dictationHotkey.label: Key binding
hotkeys.recordingModes.heading: Recording Modes
hotkeys.recordingModes.holdDescription: Press and hold the hotkey → speak → release to stop and transcribe
hotkeys.recordingModes.toggleDescription: Quick double-press → recording persists → press again to stop
hotkeys.recordingModes.note: Both modes work automatically with the same hotkey — no need to choose.
hotkeys.continuous.heading: Continuous Mode
hotkeys.continuous.label: Continuous recording
hotkeys.continuous.description: After each dictation is transcribed, recording restarts automatically. Press the hotkey again to stop.
transcription.engine.heading: Engine
transcription.offline.textCleanupDescrip: Remove hard fillers, fix restart stutters, and shape joined dictation into cleaner sentences
transcription.offline.accuracyBoostDescr: Keep fast preview updates, then run a smarter final offline pass on longer or unstable dictation to improve language consistency
transcription.offline.numeralsDescriptio: Convert spoken number words to digits (e.g. "twenty three" becomes "23")
transcription.offline.hallucinationFilte: Remove phantom phrases (e.g. "thank you for watching") and repetition loops that models produce on silence
transcription.offline.spokenPunctuationD: Say "period", "comma", "question mark", "new line" etc. to insert punctuation (English only)
command.description: Hold the command hotkey, speak your request, release. Powered by Groq.
command.hotkey.heading: Command Hotkey
command.hotkey.label: Command hotkey
command.api.heading: API Configuration
command.systemPrompt.heading: System Prompt
command.systemPrompt.description: Instructions that tell the LLM how to handle your voice commands.
command.systemPrompt.placeholder: You are a voice command assistant...
vocabulary.general.name: User Vocabulary
vocabulary.general.description: Always active. Your personal terms and rules apply to all transcriptions.
vocabulary.editor.addTermHint: AI generates common misspelling variants as substitution rules.
vocabulary.editor.noNewVariants: No new variants found — all generated variants already exist.
vocabulary.editor.noVariants: No variants generated for this term.
vocabulary.editor.noTerms: No terms yet. Add one above.
vocabulary.editor.removeTermTitle: Remove term and all its rules
vocabulary.editor.noSubstitutionRules: No substitution rules for this term
profiles.description: Hold dictation key + style's shortcut key to apply a style during recording. Uses openai/gpt-oss-120b via Groq.
history.empty: No transcriptions yet. Start dictating to build your history.
history.entry.selectWords: Select words to add to your dictionary:
history.clear.confirm: Clear all transcription history? This removes every saved history item.
about.description: A Windows-first, offline-focused voice dictation app. Speak naturally and your words appear wherever you type.
about.keyboardShortcuts.heading: Keyboard Shortcuts
about.keyboardShortcuts.holdValue: Hold hotkey to record, release to stop
about.keyboardShortcuts.toggleValue: Double-press to start, single press to stop
about.footer: Created by Alisher Mutaliyev. Privacy-first: audio is processed locally by default.
updater.heading: Updates
model.cpuFallbackNotice: Using CPU mode, which may be slower than GPU.
model.diskSize: Parakeet TDT model (~2.4 GB on disk).
model.deleteConfirm: Delete the speech model? This frees ~2.4 GB but you'll need to re-download it to use offline transcription.
model.download.initializingMessage: Loading model into memory... This may take a moment.
model.notDownloaded.message: Speech model not downloaded yet (~2.4 GB).
llm.provider.groq.name: Groq
llm.provider.groq.desc: Ultra-fast inference. GPT-OSS 120B. Requires API key.
llm.provider.ollama.name: Ollama (Local)
llm.provider.ollama.desc: Free, runs locally. Requires Ollama installed.
llm.provider.openai.name: OpenAI
llm.provider.openai.desc: GPT-4o-mini or GPT-4o. Requires API key.
llm.provider.claude.name: Claude (Anthropic)
llm.provider.claude.desc: Claude Sonnet or Haiku. Requires API key.
onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to YOLO Voice
onboarding.welcome.description: Offline voice dictation for Windows. Speak naturally and your words appear wherever you type.
onboarding.engine.title: Transcription Engine
onboarding.engine.description: Choose how your speech gets transcribed.
onboarding.engine.offlineDescription: Uses Parakeet TDT locally with GPU acceleration. Private, no internet needed after setup. Requires a one-time ~2.4 GB model download.
onboarding.engine.cloudDescription: Uses Groq or Deepgram API. Fast, no GPU needed. Requires API key and internet.
onboarding.download.title: Download Speech Model
onboarding.download.description: The Parakeet TDT model (~2.4 GB) provides high-accuracy offline transcription with built-in punctuation and capitalization.
onboarding.download.modelDescription: 25 languages with auto-detection. GPU accelerated via DirectML (AMD, Intel, NVIDIA).
onboarding.download.initializingNote: This may take a moment. The app may be briefly unresponsive.
onboarding.done.title: You're All Set!
onboarding.done.description: YOLO Voice is ready to use. Press your hotkey to start dictating.
onboarding.done.gpuWarning: GPU acceleration is not available. Transcription will use CPU, which may be slower. Ensure your GPU drivers are up to date.
engine.offline.speedCpu: Fast, slightly slower than GPU (~1-3s for 10s audio)
engine.offline.privacyNote: Runs fully offline. No data leaves your machine.
engine.cloud.privacyNoteGroq: Requires API key. Audio is sent to Groq servers for processing.
engine.cloud.privacyNoteDeepgram: Requires API key. Audio is sent to Deepgram servers for processing.
